content.title: Optimizing Retrieval for Agentic Systems

speaker.name: Trey Grainger
speaker.title: Founder & CEO
speaker.bio: Lead author of AI-Powered Search. 18 years of experience in search and data science.

content.overview: Learn fundamental techniques of modern AI-powered information retrieval. Covers vector search, semantic search, and how to think about retrieval for modern AI and agentic systems.
whoShouldAttend: Anyone wanting modern AI Search techniques
Engineers optimizing retrieval for RAG systems
whoShouldNotAttend: Complete beginners with no coding experience
Those looking for a non-technical overview
Anyone expecting pre-built solutions without hands-on work
